title: Converting Oracle data types to PostgreSQL
summary: Google Cloud demonstrates using Gemini to convert Oracle database data types to PostgreSQL equivalents, including VARCHAR2, NUMBER, and DATE. The tool provides both conversion and explanatory output to help developers understand the process and improve their PostgreSQL expertise.
